---
name: Question / clarification
about: Ask a question about how Praxikon works, propose a clarification to an existing concept note, or point out an error.
title: "[question] "
labels: ["question"]
---

## What's the question?

One or two sentences.

## Context

If this is about an existing concept note, link it. If it's about the architecture / contribution / installation model, mention which section of the README the question relates to.

## What did you try / what did you expect?

(Skip if not applicable.)
